welcome.title: Welcome to SnowLuma Desktop
welcome.subtitle: The desktop launcher for SnowLuma — get a QQ bot online in five minutes.

factLocal.title: Local data only
factLocal.body: Bot configs, chat history, credentials live on your machine. Nothing is uploaded.

factHook.title: How it works: process injection
factHook.body: SnowLuma injects a DLL into QQ after you log in, the same approach as NapCat.

factAv.title: AV may complain
factAv.body: Process injection is exactly what AV looks for. We'll guide you through whitelisting Defender.

network.title: Download mirrors
network.subtitle: Defaults to GitHub Releases. Configure mirrors below if needed.

av.title: Antivirus whitelist
av.subtitle: We recommend whitelisting SnowLuma in Defender so the native addon isn't quarantined.
av.defenderRunning: Defender is running — whitelisting prevents false-positives.
av.thirdPartyHint: Whitelist them in their own UI.

coreDownload.title: Download core
coreDownload.subtitle: Picks a core version and unpacks to %APPDATA%/SnowLumaDesktop/core/versions/<version>/.

qqDetect.title: Detect QQ
qqDetect.subtitle: Desktop does not bundle QQ — install QQ (QQNT) separately first.
qqDetect.notFoundHint: Install QQ from the official site, then re-detect.
qqDetect.compatBad: Known to be broken; switch versions

addBot.title: Add your first Bot
addBot.subtitle: Desktop launches QQ; once you log in, SnowLuma injects automatically.
addBot.launchDesktopHint: Desktop will launch, monitor and restart QQ.
addBot.launchUserHint: Desktop only watches for QQ and injects.
addBot.hideAfterLogin: Hide QQ main window after login
addBot.hideAfterLoginHint: Stops users from treating QQ as a plain client.
addBot.loginHint: A QQ window will open; scan QR or enter password to log in.

prefs.title: Preferences
prefs.subtitle: Autostart + launch behaviour. Editable later in Settings.
prefs.openMainOnLaunchHint: If off, Desktop launches silently into the tray.

done.title: All set 🎉
done.subtitle: Desktop is ready. Click below to enter the main UI.

bots.title: Bots
bots.bannerHint: Click below to add your first bot.
bots.webuiUnavailable: core not running or webui unavailable.
bots.renameHint: Pick a memorable name; QQ nickname stays as a subtitle.
bots.deleteHint: Type the Bot's name to confirm. You have a 5-second undo window.
bots.confirmNameLabel: Type the Bot's name to confirm

diagnostic.title: Export diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: Bundle logs and environment into a zip for issue reports.
diagnostic.privacyNote: UINs are hashed; other sensitive fields removed. Inspect before sharing.
